summary: Iteration 12: Backend refactoring verification complete. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend login page and dual-view navigation (Finance Tracker ↔ Accounting) working correctly. The monolithic server.py (2873 lines) was successfully split into modular route files with no regression.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns user data (user_id, email, name)
Backend: GET /api/accounts - returns accounts list (2 accounts)
Backend: GET /api/trial-balance - returns balanced trial balance (Dr=Cr)
Backend: GET /api/daybook - returns daybook entries with ledger_name
Backend: GET /api/financial-years - returns FY list with current_fy
Backend: All 13 endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)
Frontend: Login page loads with Google OAuth button
Frontend: Finance Tracker view shows correct nav (Dashboard, Accounts, Transactions, Upload, Categories, Settings)
Frontend: Accounting view shows correct nav (Dashboard, Chart of Accounts, Vouchers, Daybook, Trial Balance, Reports, Settings)
Frontend: View switcher toggles between Finance Tracker and Accounting views
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - server.py reduced from 2873 lines to 55 lines
All route modules properly imported and registered with FastAPI app
Database connection, models, auth, bridge, and helpers correctly separated
CORS middleware properly configured for production and localhost
All endpoints maintain backward compatibility after refactoring
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test transactions with TEST_ prefix for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified the major backend refactoring. The monolithic server.py (2873 lines) was split into: database.py, models.py, auth.py, bridge.py, helpers.py, and 10 route files under routes/ (auth_routes.py, accounts.py, categories.py, transactions.py, analytics.py, accounting.py, upload.py, ai.py, backup.py, email_sync.py). All 29 API tests passed. Frontend dual-view navigation works correctly. No regression detected.

new_structure.routes/accounting.py: Accounting endpoints (vouchers, trial balance, P&L, balance sheet, daybook, company, FY, ledgers, account groups)
